testcase.name: test_minimum_cover_with_regard_to_casting_surface_latex[CastingSurface.PREPARED_GROUND-k1 \u2265 c_{min,dur} + 40 mm for Prepared ground (including blinding)]
test_minimum_cover_with_regard_to_casting_surface_latex[CastingSurface.DIRECTLY_AGAINST_SOIL-k2 \u2265 c_{min,dur} + 75 mm for Directly against soil]
test_structural_class_delta_concrete_grade[concrete_grade0-exposure_classes0-4- + 0 class (no reduction with respect to concrete grade)]
test_latex[complete-c_{min,dur} = structural class S3 \\& exposure classes (XC2, XF4, XA1) = 20]
test_latex[complete-c_{min,dur} = structural class S3 & exposure classes (XC2, XF4, XA1) = 25]

test_latex[complete-l_0 = l \\cdot max\\left\\{\\sqrt{1+10 \\cdot \\frac{k_1 \\cdot k_2}{k_1+k_2}}; \\left(1+\\frac{k_1}{1 + k_1}\\right) \\cdot \\left(1 + \\frac{k_2}{1 + k_2}\\right) \\right\\} = 4.000 \\cdot max\\left\\{\\sqrt{1+10 \\cdot \\frac{2.000 \\cdot 3.000}{2.000+3.000}}; \\left(1+\\frac{2.000}{1 + 2.000}\\right) \\cdot \\left(1 + \\frac{3.000}{1 + 3.000}\\right) \\right\\} = 14.422]

test_latex[complete-K_{r} = \\min\\left(\\frac{\\left(1 + \\frac{A_{s} \\cdot f_{yd}}{A_{c} \\cdot f_{cd}}\\right) - \\frac{N_{Ed}}{A_{c} \\cdot f_{cd}}}{\\left(1 + \\frac{A_{s} \\cdot f_{yd}}{A_{c} \\cdot f_{cd}}\\right) - n_{bal}}, 1\\right) = \\min\\left(\\frac{\\left(1 + \\frac{100.000 \\cdot 500.000}{2000.000 \\cdot 30.000}\\right) - \\frac{100000.000}{2000.000 \\cdot 30.000}}{\\left(1 + \\frac{100.000 \\cdot 500.000}{2000.000 \\cdot 30.000}\\right) - 0.400}, 1\\right) = 0.116 -]
test_latex_replace_symbols_error[\\frac{A}{A}-replacements1-True-Symbol 'A' found multiple times in the template.]
